The '''Churba system''', also known as the '''New Cov system''',<ref name="SWR">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> was in the [[Churba sector/Legends|Churba sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It included eight [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. A [[Battle of the Churba system (Great Sith War)|battle]] of the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] was fought here.

The Churba system was home to [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Agent/Legends|agent]] [[Kirtan Loor]].

==Planets==
Four of the known eight planets are listed below:

*[[Barhu]] – Uninhabitable, closest to the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] [[Star/Legends|sun]].
*[[Hurcha]] – Also uninhabitable, farthest from the system's center.
*[[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]] – Third planet in the system.
*[[Churba]]

==Behind the scenes==
The PC [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] mistakenly places the Churba sector and, consequently, the Churba system, in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
